narrative:
08 court of appeals district has 862,439 registered voters, with 58.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 10.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 31.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 20.8 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +8.9% D−R vs +26.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
